definition:
καθαρισμός, -oῦ, τό
 (καθαρίζω). [in LXX for טָהֵר, טׇהֳרָה, etc. ;] 
cleansing, purification: Jhn.3:25; with genitive subjc., τ. Ἰουδαίων, Jhn.2:6; with genitive obj., of women after childbirth, Luk.2:22; of lepers, Mrk.1:44, Luk.5:14; with genitive of thing(s), τ. ἁμαρτιῶν, Heb.1:3, 2Pe.1:9 (Cremer, 319).†
 (AS)
